Name: Davis Street from Cockrell Hill to Clinton Ave
Description: Linked to PB06U209 Davis from Hampton to Westmoreland.  Street reconstruction project.  Will also include bike lanes.  Partnership project with Dallas County. This is Phase 1 of Davis Street Corridor which is a 3-phase partnership project with Dallas County with the City being the lead to implement the project. The three phases are as follows: Phase 1 from Hampton to Clinton; Phase 2 from Westmoreland to Hampton; Phase 3 from Cockrell Hill to Westmorland. Phase 1 of Davis Street project from Hampton Rd to Clinton along with other projects were advertised through an RFQ process, and Burgess and Niple, Inc. was selected to design Phase 1. Phase 2 and Phase 3 of the project will follow after Phase 1 provided funding becomes available.

Name: Cockrell Hill from La Reunion to Singleton
Description: Construct a new four lane divided roadway including a new bridge over UPRR and new traffic signals at Singleton Boulevard.   Dallas County is the lead agency responsible for administering the design, right-of-way, utility relocations, and construction.  The project includes a new grade-separated overpass over the UPRR tracks and widening 1,500 linear feet of Vinson Road north of bridge.  The bridge section will be four lanes divided and the roadway section will consist of five lanes with a two-way left turn lane.
